name: product-ux
description: BeSpunky product & UX design skills. keep-users-oriented: whenever you make someone wait or move them through a process, answer the three questions - what is the expected result, where am I in the process, what is the next step - and pick the right feedback for deterministic vs nondeterministic processes. A universal service-design principle, expressed primarily through software UI (loading/progress, async ops, multi-step flows, long-running jobs, notifications, optimistic UI).
